name: project-wiki
description: Obsidian-friendly, multi-project LLM knowledge wiki for Claude Code — ingest raw info from any source (Slack, email, PDFs, docs), auto-route it to the right project, and compile it into a self-maintaining, cross-linked markdown wiki. Implements Karpathy's LLM-wiki pattern (raw → wiki → schema, compilation over retrieval). Companion to project-context.
